mapper.select: SELECT m.station_id, s.name AS station_name, c.region, s.sort_index, m.month_key, m.forecast_type, m.mae_kw, m.rmse_kw, m.accuracy_pct FROM fc_monthly_accuracy_snapshot m JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = m.station_id JOIN sa_company c ON c.id = s.company_id ORDER BY m.month_key, s.sort_index, m.forecast_type
